commentary_parts:
Paragraph one begins with a continuous commentary block that should remain contiguous and readable without premature line breaks. It carries the main argument through several sentences so that the splitter has enough material to work with. Paragraph one keeps developing the same idea and ends in a complete sentence.

Paragraph two continues the prose without any citation marker. It should be grouped by paragraph and then packed into a bounded pseudo-passage rather than left as a single enormous commentary block. Paragraph two closes cleanly.

Paragraph three is similarly ordinary prose. It exists only to push the passage over the unanchored size threshold, forcing the segmentation logic to split by paragraph boundaries before any sentence-level fallback is needed.
